computed_from.note: TV connected. Premarket bars read. Prior session levels audited — all 7 dropped (missing mandatory fields: source, verified_at, expires_at, reasoning). Re-added as properly formatted levels from chart structure verification.

levels.label: PDH_HIGH
levels.reasoning: Yesterday's RTH high (2026-06-01 12:35 ET per prior session data). Key ceiling — price sold off ~$4 from here into close. Watch for rejection on any retest.
levels.notes: Prior session TOD_HIGH. $4 gap to current price.

levels.label: PMH
levels.reasoning: Today's premarket high — first bar 04:00 ET ripped to 758.22 then pulled back to 757.03. This is the pre-open ceiling and will be a key test on RTH open.

levels.label: PDH_RECLAIMED
levels.reasoning: Prior day high from 2026-05-29 / prior session area. Yesterday price broke above then closed back below — acts as key resistance zone confluent with today's PMH 758.22.
levels.notes: 758.08 + 758.22 form a tight resistance cluster. Need clean break+hold above 758.22 for bull continuation.

levels.label: SWING_HIGH
levels.reasoning: Yesterday's morning consolidation ceiling (tested 3x, per prior session). Price is near 757.03 — if RTH opens below 757.42 this is first resistance to clear.
levels.notes: Current price 757.03 is below this. RTH open vs 757.42 is the opening battle.

levels.label: FIRST_SWING
levels.reasoning: Yesterday's first morning rejection area (tested 3x). Now acts as support on pullbacks. Current price 757.03 is just above — key near-term floor.

levels.label: PML
levels.reasoning: Today's premarket low — tested around 08:15-08:25 ET. If RTH opens and drops below 756.70, the premarket range is broken and bear structure is in play.

levels.label: PRIOR_CLOSE
levels.reasoning: Yesterday's RTH close. Gap-up open today — if SPY falls back to 756.56, gap is filled and bear setup elevated.

levels.label: ROUND_756
levels.reasoning: Psychological round number. Bounced multiple times during 2026-06-01 session.

levels.label: MORNING_LOW
levels.reasoning: Yesterday's morning consolidation low. Strong support — tested multiple times without breaking.

levels.label: SESSION_LOW
levels.reasoning: Yesterday's RTH session low (09:40 ET). Deep support — a break below here signals significant bearish pressure.
